response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and modern tooling. However, his background lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, though his leadership and mentoring experience is a positive signal.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience, including organizing workshops and talks.
Diverse experience with distributed systems, real-time data processing, and infrastructure (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, Kubernetes at Datadog).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating passion for engineering best practices.
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience; primary expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Dlang, and other languages.
Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms or production-level cloud architecture (AWS CDK at Shopify is the closest).
Most recent roles (Stripe, Shopify) are full-stack/product-focused rather than infrastructure or systems engineering.
